positive: Highly detailed, stylized illustration of a celestial woodland scene. Central composition featuring interlocking elements: giant bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate floating nebula dust, stylized crescent moons, and elegant, curling floral vines. The color palette is dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant emerald greens, and contrasting luminous gold and electric cyan accents. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curves and modern vector illustration, emphasizing thick, clean lines and bold, high-contrast silhouettes. The overall mood is magical and mysterious. Perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. Minimal background clutter, maximum symbolic impact.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, lowres, grainy, sketch, abstract noise, messy lines
